title: Horror MC
body:
[![Header banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/HorrorMinecraft/MP_HorrorMinecraft_header.webp)](https://pixeldreamstudios.net/)

[**![Promotional banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/HorrorMinecraft/MP_HorrorMinecraft_promo.webp)**](https://www.bisecthosting.com/PixelDream)

![Description banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/HorrorMinecraft/MP_HorrorMinecraft_description.webp)

Enjoy the REFRESHED HORROR EXPERIENCE! 🎃

''Horror MC'' is a chilling modpack that turns the once-familiar Minecraft world into a terrifying nightmare. Frightening creatures, nightmarish landscapes, and relentless challenges await. Survival becomes a harrowing ordeal as you face gruesome monsters and eerie dimensions. Resources are in short supply, and an ever-present sense of dread keeps you on edge. If you are brave enough to dive into this modpack, be prepared for an experience that will leave you trembling with fear.

- 👻 Jumpscares that will keep you on your toes
- 🧟‍♂️ Terrifying creatures lurking in the shadows
- 🌌 Eerie dimensions filled with unknown horrors
- 🏚️ Nightmarish landscapes that distort reality
- 🔪 Relentless challenges that test your survival skills
- 💀 Gruesome monsters that haunt your every step
- 🛠️ Limited resources making survival even tougher
- 🌑 Ever-present sense of dread that keeps you on edge

This modpack is meant to be played with **shaders ON**. 🌟

[![Discord banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/HorrorMinecraft/MP_HorrorMinecraft_discord.webp)](https://discord.gg/pixel-dream-studios-872788557553610802)
